title: LEWIS & CLARK PROBLEM GAMBLING SERVICES - 211info
text: LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER LEWIS & CLARK PROBLEM GAMBLING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment to individuals, couples, and families for problem gambling issues. All services are confidential. Supports social equity by providing easily accessible and culturally sensitive treatment. 4445 SW Barbur Boulevard Suites 107, 205 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Any person experiencing problem or compulsive gambling that is an Oregon resident or does most of their gambling in the state of Oregon. Family members, partners, friends, and coworkers of problem gamblers are eligible for services. Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clinic: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 9am-8pm, Saturday-Sunday 9am-4pm Email (503) 768-6325 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 768-6325 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for initial phone screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located near downtown Portland, at the same location as the Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde. Accessible by public transposition and bicycle routes. Services: Gambling Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LEWIS & CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER
